hero.description: I build exceptional digital experiences from Córdoba, Argentina. Specialized in transforming ideas into modern, fast, responsive, and SEO-optimized websites.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Hello! I'm Joaquin Garcia, a web developer from Córdoba, Argentina. I specialize in building websites and web applications. I love this field and I am excited to continue growing as a developer.
about.p2: I am here to help you build the digital presence you need. If you need a website, maintenance, or personalized consulting, feel free to contact me.

services.title: My Services
services.s1_desc: Web design tailored to your preferences and responsive to adapt to any device.
services.s2_desc: Performance and SEO optimization using the best modern practices.
services.s3_desc: Technical support and continuous maintenance to guarantee your website works smoothly.

skills.subtitle: TECHNOLOGIES & TOOLS
skills.title: My Skills
skills.noProjects: No projects registered with this skill.
skills.clickIcon: Click the skill shortcuts on the screen to view detailed information.

desc.html: Markup language for creating web pages.
desc.css: Style sheet language for styling web pages.
desc.react: Open-source JavaScript library designed for building user interfaces.
desc.nextjs: Web development framework built on top of React.
desc.nodejs: JavaScript runtime environment for server-side execution.
desc.expressjs: Fast, minimalist, and flexible web framework for Node.js.
desc.php: Programming language used alongside WordPress for advanced functionality development.
desc.wordpress: Platform used for web development, including advanced features like CPT (Custom Post Types) and custom fields.
desc.woocommerce: WordPress plugin for e-commerce store creation.

projects.title: My Work
projects.no_projects: No projects found in this category.

desc.progresia_compliance: Landing page for Progresia, a strategic consulting firm in integrity and corporate compliance, offering solutions in risk management, auditing, and business transparency.
desc.club_universitario_de_cordoba: Institutional website for Club Universitario de Córdoba, where visitors can explore the different sports disciplines and easily access contact information.
desc.star_sa: Landing page for Star S.A, a company that integrates physical security, electronic security, and cleaning with applied technology, ensuring operational continuity and certified comprehensive service.
desc.hdt_print: Digital catalog for HDT Print, exclusive representative of Bambu Lab in Brazil, featuring 3D printers, filaments, and reseller support.
desc.nexus_br: Landing page for Nexus BR, a strategic ecosystem that connects leading companies in technology, mobility, and defense with international markets.
desc.pefin: Web catalog for a paint and hardware store in Villa del Rosario, offering products for home and construction.
desc.nowet: Institutional website for Nowet, an Argentine company with over 35 years of experience in animal nutrition, specializing in consulting and sustainable products for meat, dairy, poultry, equine, and swine production.
desc.la_industrial: Online store for electrical materials in Tunuyán, with a digital catalog aimed at both individual clients and professionals.
desc.centro_sbz: Online store for Centro SBZ, specialized in dental equipment and products, with a professional and functional approach.
desc.nevisca: Digital catalog for a food distributor with more than 20 years of experience.
desc.tutu_automotores: Dealership with a digital catalog and conversion-oriented design.
desc.duc: Corporate website with a blog for the DUC soap brand, with a minimalist approach.
desc.escuela_stop: Driving school with a reservation system and a local focus.
desc.multipap: Web catalog for a processed food distributor with a wholesale focus.
desc.dona_nua: Online store for women's fashion with a dynamic catalog.
desc.crespo: Online saddlery and equestrian products store with a traditional aesthetic.
desc.vg_agronegocios: Corporate one-pager for an agricultural company with a regional presence.
desc.gloed: Gloed is an online store that offers cleaning and personal care products, providing home solutions with a variety of essential items.
desc.farmacia_siman: Farmacia Siman offers health, beauty, and personal care products, providing a wide range of essential wellness items.
desc.menzi_almada: Menzi Almada is a family dealership in Villa Allende, Córdoba, specializing in the sale of cars, motorcycles, SUVs, and pickups, focusing on transparency and personalized attention.
desc.la_cautiva: La Cautiva is a store specializing in barbecue products, offering a wide variety of fire pits, kamados, cutlery, and gourmet accessories.
desc.uon: UON is a real estate development with over 20 years of experience, focused on creating innovative, high-quality urban spaces.
desc.ezimpl_reply: Reply is an international company that helps other companies improve their online sales through strategy and comprehensive e-commerce management.
desc.auad_graf: Redesigned the website of Auad Graf, a law firm, in collaboration with the team at VERVEL agency.
desc.gc_dental: Developed an e-commerce platform in collaboration with the team at VERVEL agency for GC Dental, a dental supplies company.
desc.lm_amoblamientos: Developed a web catalog in collaboration with the team at VERVEL agency, incorporating a dynamic PHP form to access products by attributes.
desc.deligood: Developed a landing page for Deligood ice cream parlor in collaboration with the team at VERVEL agency.
desc.planetizar: Developed the Planetizar website together with the team at VERVEL agency, a platform for booking unique travel experiences. The design balances functionality and aesthetics, offering an intuitive experience to explore and book personalized experiences.
desc.cucina: Corporate page developed together with the team at VERVEL agency, for a software company applied to gastronomy.
desc.american_pass: Landing page developed together with the team at VERVEL agency, using Elementor and WordPress plugins to customize the site and adapt it to the client's needs.
desc.boiero: Web catalog developed together with the team at VERVEL agency to explore and request quotes for products, where I learned to use plugins and custom code to enable the catalog mode in WooCommerce.
desc.previa: Social platform developed together with the team at VERVEL agency to coordinate meetings and social events, where I customized the theme and WordPress plugins to adapt them to the client's needs.
desc.hibridos: Developed a website for a digital marketing agency, allowing clients to explore and book services, and learned to use plugins to make the site multilingual.
desc.afroditas_pleasure: Developed a lingerie e-commerce store, learning to create product templates in Elementor and configure payment and shipping methods in WooCommerce.
desc.the_rod: Created a website for a Digital Agency, offering clients a digital platform to explore and book services. I learned to use Elementor and customize WordPress templates.
desc.la_fermina: Created a website for a Party & Event Hall, offering clients a digital platform to explore and book services.
